name: Platform Fit Matrix
summary: A compact comparison lens for deciding whether AWS, Azure, GCP, Heroku, or Snowflake best fits the real context.
whenToUseIt: Use it before platform selection meetings, vendor comparisons, or executive discussions about cloud direction.
steps: Name the primary need: breadth, enterprise fit, data strength, or simplicity
List the team's existing tools, skills, and procurement reality
Compare which platform matches those constraints best
Choose the least-complex viable option instead of the most impressive one
example: Azure may fit a Microsoft-heavy enterprise, while Snowflake may be the anchor decision when analytics and governed data sharing are the main business priority.
